message:
fix: add flock locking, atomic archive, write error checks, and corruption detection to legacy JSONL mailbox (gt-uglmm)

(1) Add flock-based file locking to all read-modify-write operations
(markReadLegacy, markUnreadLegacy, deleteLegacy, appendLegacy,
archiveLegacy, PurgeArchive) to prevent concurrent modifications from
losing updates.

(2) Make Archive atomic for legacy mode: a single flock covers the
entire read-archive-rewrite cycle so a crash between appendToArchive
and inbox rewrite cannot lose the message.

(3) Check write errors in rewriteLegacy and rewriteArchive instead of
silently ignoring them (disk-full now returns an error).

(4) Detect malformed JSONL lines in listLegacy and ListArchived
instead of silently skipping them (returns error with file path and
line number).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
